requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (Netherlands / ILT)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类（荷兰 / ILT）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類（荷蘭 / ILT）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU (PED) applies to heat pump refrigerant circuits as pressure equipment. Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body. EN 378 applies for system-level refrigerating system safety. In the Netherlands, market surveillance for pressure equipment is conducted by ILT (Inspectie Leefomgeving en Transport).
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）将热泵制冷剂回路视为压力设备加以管理。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构。EN 378适用于系统级制冷系统安全。在荷兰，压力设备的市场监督由ILT（生活环境与交通监察局）负责。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）將熱泵制冷劑迴路視為壓力設備加以管理。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構。EN 378適用於系統級制冷系統安全。在荷蘭，壓力設備的市場監督由ILT（生活環境與交通監察局）負責。

standards_or_laws: ILT (Inspectie Leefomgeving en Transport) — NL enforcement

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not a CE marking equivalent.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册并非CE标志的等效证明。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記並非CE標誌的等效證明。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body must be engaged. ILT in the Netherlands actively monitors PED compliance for pressure-equipment placed on the Dutch market; importers should be prepared to produce full technical documentation.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在PED下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入公告机构。荷兰ILT积极监测在荷兰市场投放的压力设备PED合规情况；进口商须准备完整技术文件。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在PED下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入公告機構。荷蘭ILT積極監測在荷蘭市場投放的壓力設備PED合規情況；進口商須準備完整技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED applies to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds; ILT enforces in NL)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED; ILT conducts market surveillance in the Netherlands.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在PED下不被认可；ILT在荷兰开展市场监督。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在PED下不被認可；ILT在荷蘭開展市場監督。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 System Safety and Dutch Building Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378系统安全与荷兰建筑法规
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378系統安全與荷蘭建築法規

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits meeting its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020, EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019, EN 378-3:2016, and EN 378-4:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps. In the Netherlands, the Besluit bouwwerken leefomgeving (Bbl) under the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen mandates heat pump integration from 2026, and installation safety must comply with Dutch building codes as well as the product-level EN 378 requirements. Refrigerant charge limits for indoor spaces in Dutch dwellings may additionally be governed by local building permit conditions.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准。在荷兰，《建筑环境法令》（Bbl）依据《建筑质量保证法》规定自2026年起强制整合热泵，安装安全须同时符合荷兰建筑规范和产品级EN 378要求。荷兰住宅室内制冷剂充注量限制还可能受地方建筑许可条件的约束。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020、EN 378-2:2016+A1:2019、EN 378-3:2016和EN 378-4:2016是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準。在荷蘭，《建築環境法令》（Bbl）依據《建築品質保障法》規定自2026年起強制整合熱泵，安裝安全須同時符合荷蘭建築規範和產品級EN 378要求。荷蘭住宅室內制冷劑充注量限制還可能受地方建築許可條件的約束。

standards_or_laws: Besluit bouwwerken leefomgeving (Bbl) — NL building regulation

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. The current revision status of GB/T 9237 should be verified at time of compliance assessment. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. China has no equivalent mandatory heat-pump integration policy at the building regulation level.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。GB/T 9237当前修订状态应在合规评估时予以核查。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。中国在建筑法规层面没有等效的热泵强制整合政策。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。GB/T 9237當前修訂狀態應在合規評估時予以核查。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。中國在建築法規層面沒有等效的熱泵強制整合政策。

gap.en: EU legal compliance must be assessed against PED where the refrigerant circuit falls within PED scope. EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237. Additionally, Dutch installation context under the Bbl may impose additional ventilation and charge-limit conditions beyond product-level EN 378 that exporters and installers must verify with local authorities.
gap.zh: 若制冷剂回路落入PED范围，欧盟法律合规性必须按PED评估。EN 378的文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同。此外，《建筑环境法令》（Bbl）下的荷兰安装环境可能在产品级EN 378要求之外增加通风和充注量限制条件，出口商和安装商须向当地主管部门核实。
gap.zht: 若制冷劑迴路落入PED範圍，歐盟法律合規性必須按PED評估。EN 378的文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同。此外，《建築環境法令》（Bbl）下的荷蘭安裝環境可能在產品級EN 378要求之外增加通風和充注量限制條件，出口商和安裝商須向當地主管部門核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; EN 378 voluntary but widely used; Bbl creates additional NL installation obligations from 2026
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 9237 under fire safety and product safety regime)

source.publisher: Overheid.nl — Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen / Bbl

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED applicability must be classified first; Dutch Bbl adds installation-level obligations from 2026; EN 378 charge-limit and ventilation methods differ from GB 9237 and must be re-assessed for Dutch building conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED适用性；荷兰Bbl自2026年起增加安装级义务；EN 378的充注量限制和通风方法与GB 9237不同，须针对荷兰建筑条件重新评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED適用性；荷蘭Bbl自2026年起增加安裝級義務；EN 378的充注量限制和通風方法與GB 9237不同，須針對荷蘭建築條件重新評估。
